title: AGENTOBS DiffPayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2 — Payload for prompt and response delta analysis events in the llm.diff.* namespace. Diff events capture the change between two versions of a prompt or response, enabling regression detection and prompt experiment tracking without storing full content. Two event types: llm.diff.computed (a diff was calculated between two events), llm.diff.regression.flagged (a diff-based regression threshold was exceeded).

DiffComputedPayload.title: DiffComputedPayload
DiffComputedPayload.description: Payload for llm.diff.computed — a textual or semantic diff was computed between a reference event and a target event.

target_event_id.description: ULID of the target (current) event being compared against the reference.

diff_type.description: The type of diff computation performed.

similarity_score.description: Semantic or textual similarity between the reference and target (0.0 = completely different, 1.0 = identical).

added_tokens.description: Net token count added in the target relative to the reference.

removed_tokens.description: Net token count removed in the target relative to the reference.

diff_algorithm.description: Algorithm used to compute the diff.

ref_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the reference content. Enables verification without storing content.

target_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the target content.

computation_duration_ms.description: Time taken to compute the diff in milliseconds.

DiffRegressionFlaggedPayload.title: DiffRegressionFlaggedPayload
DiffRegressionFlaggedPayload.description: Payload for llm.diff.regression.flagged — a diff computation exceeded a similarity threshold, indicating a potentially significant change that warrants inspection.

target_event_id.description: ULID of the target event that triggered the regression.

diff_type.description: The type of content that regressed.

similarity_score.description: Actual similarity score that triggered the regression flag.

threshold.description: Minimum similarity threshold configured; scores below this trigger the regression flag.

severity.description: Operator-configured severity level based on the magnitude of the drift.

diff_event_id.description: ULID of the originating llm.diff.computed event that produced the score triggering this flag.

alert_target.description: Routing target for this regression alert (e.g. Slack channel ID, PagerDuty policy ID, email address).
